Lvl30.Name: Combo
Lvl30.Desc: After resolving the effects of an ability with Combo, you may use one of the specified abilities at any point during your turn. You may move before doing so, and may choose a new target when using this additional ability.

Lvl40.Name: Oath Mastery
Lvl40.Desc: Certain effects grant you Conviction.You can have up to 4 Conviction atany given time. At the start of your turn, gain 1 Conviction.

Lvl60.Name: Enhanced Enmity
Lvl60.Desc: Enemies that you have Enmity on incur a -8 penalty on all ability checksthat do not target you.

Lvl30.Name: Paladin Combo (Fast Blade + Riot Blade)
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target. Combo:Rage of Halone

ComboAbilities.Name: Rage of Halone
ComboAbilities.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target.
ComboAbilities.DirectHit: Direct Hit: Deals an additional 1d6 damage

Lvl30.Name: Total Eclipse
Lvl30.Range: A 5x5 area centered on this character
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Shield Bash
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 3 damage, inflicts Enmity, and Stuns the target until the end of this turn.

Lvl30.Name: Shield Lob
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Rampart
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Reduce the damage you take from abilties by 2 until the start of your next turn.

Lvl30.Name: Low Blow
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Stuns the target until the end of this turn.

Lvl30.Name: Spirits Within
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Deals 2 damage and inflicts Enmity on the target.

Lvl30.Name: Sturdy Shield
Lvl30.Trigger: Immediately after an ability check for an ability that targets you
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Increase your Defense by 1d6 for the ability check that triggered Sturdy Shield. Use this new value to determine if the ability scores a direct hit.

Lvl30.Name: Fight or Flight
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Grants one advantage die on your next ability check this turn.

Lvl30.Name: Provoke
Lvl30.Trigger: When an enemy begins their turn
Lvl30.Target: The enemy that triggered this ability

Lvl30.Name: Interject
Lvl30.Trigger: When an adjacent enemy uses an invoked ability, or is using an invoked ability to generate a marker
Lvl30.Target: The enemy that triggered this ability
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Interrupts the invoked ability that triggered Interject, negating it completely.

Lvl30.Name: Reprisal
Lvl30.Trigger: Immediately before an ability used by an enemy within 2 squares is resolved
Lvl30.Range: A 5x5 area centered on this character
Lvl30.BaseEffect: Reduces the damage dealt by the abilities of all targets by 2 until the end of this round.
